name: ship-comms
description: Hull-native agent-to-agent messaging (agent-comms plan Option A): a durable SQLite message store at ~/.ship/ship-comms.db with send/poll/history routes under /api/ship-comms/*. Addressing is an exact session id (UUID, store-and-forward) or a name resolved against the ship-voice fleetSource contract with honest-ambiguity failure (409 + candidates). Delivery is pull-based: the Crew plugin's comms.mjs hook polls at turn boundaries and injects messages as additionalContext -- next hook event, not instant. Mounted into `ship serve` as a headless Deck station.
